'''ngashuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadsamoney|loadsamoney]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadsamoney|loadsamoney]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngashuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshijith|ngæshijith]] || [[word:ngæshijij|ngæshijij]] || [[word:ngæshijish|ngæshijish]] || [[word:ngæshiji|ngæshiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashushujuth|ngashushujuth]] || [[word:ngashushujuj|ngashushujuj]] || [[word:ngashushujush|ngashushujush]] || [[word:ngashushuju|ngashushuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashujuth|ngashujuth]] || [[word:ngashujuj|ngashujuj]] || [[word:ngashujush|ngashujush]] || [[word:ngashuju|ngashuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashufjuth|ngashufjuth]] || [[word:ngashufjuj|ngashufjuj]] || [[word:ngashufjush|ngashufjush]] || [[word:ngashufjuf|ngashufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashujuthu|ngashujuthu]] || [[word:ngashujuju|ngashujuju]] || [[word:ngashujushu|ngashujushu]] || [[word:ngashujuku|ngashujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashujuth|ngashujuth]] || [[word:ngashujuj|ngashujuj]] || [[word:ngashujush|ngashujush]] || [[word:ngashuju|ngashuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashujuthul|ngashujuthul]] || [[word:ngashujujul|ngashujujul]] || [[word:ngashujushul|ngashujushul]] || [[word:ngashujukul|ngashujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashujuthuthu|ngashujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngashujujuju|ngashujujuju]] || [[word:ngashujushushu|ngashujushushu]] || [[word:ngashujuku|ngashujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashujuthun|ngashujuthun]] || [[word:ngashujujun|ngashujujun]] || [[word:ngashujushun|ngashujushun]] || [[word:ngashujukun|ngashujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashujuthuoro|ngashujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngashujujuoro|ngashujujuoro]] || [[word:ngashujushuoro|ngashujushuoro]] || [[word:ngashujukuoro|ngashujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
